file.content:
class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

content.content:
---
class RoomsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_room, only: %i[ show destroy ]
  before_action :ensure_can_administer, only: %i[ destroy ]
  before_action :remember_last_room_visited, only: :show

  def index
    redirect_to room_url(Current.user.rooms.last)
  end

  def show
    @messages = find_messages
  end

  def destroy
    @room.destroy

    broadcast_remove_room
    redirect_to root_url
  end

  private
    def set_room
      if room = Current.user.rooms.find_by(id: params[:room_id] || params[:id])
        @room = room
      else
        redirect_to root_url, alert: "Room not found or inaccessible"
      end
    end

    def ensure_can_administer
      head :forbidden unless Current.user.can_administer?(@room)
    end

    def ensure_permission_to_create_rooms
      if Current.account.settings.restrict_room_creation_to_administrators? && !Current.user.administrator?

class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
  include RoomScoped

  def show
    @involvement = @membership.involvement
  end

  def update
    @membership.update! involvement: params[:involvement]

    broadcast_visibility_changes
    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
  end

  private
    def broadcast_visibility_changes
      case
      when @room.direct?
        # Do nothing
      when @membership.involved_in_invisible?
        broadcast_remove_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: [ @room, :list ]
      when @membership.involvement_previously_was.inquiry.invisible?
        broadcast_prepend_to @membership.user, :rooms, target: :shared_rooms, partial: "users/sidebars/rooms/shared", locals: { room: @room }
      end
    end
end

file.content:
require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end

    assert_equal "Invalid notification setting", flash[:alert]
  end

require "test_helper"

class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
  setup do
    sign_in :david
  end

  test "show" do
    get room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    assert_response :success
  end

  test "update involvement sends turbo update when becoming visible and when going invisible" do
    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 1 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "invisible" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "invisible" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end

    assert_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ], count: 2 do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "invisible", to: "everything" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "everything" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update changing visible states" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
    end
    end
  end

  test "updating involvement does not send turbo update for direct rooms" do
    assert_no_turbo_stream_broadcasts [ users(:david), :rooms ] do
    assert_changes -> { memberships(:david_david_and_jason).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "nothing" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason)), params: { involvement: "nothing" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:david_and_jason))
    end
    end
  end

  test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
    sign_in :jz

    assert_changes -> { memberships(:jz_designers).reload.involvement }, from: "everything", to: "mentions" do
      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers)), params: { involvement: "mentions" }
      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:designers))
    end
  end
end

content.text: That one failure is a pre-existing environment issue (missing `libjxl` for ffmpeg/ffprobe used in video preview generation), unrelated to this change. All other 245 tests pass, including the involvements controller tests.

M app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb
 M config/locales/en.yml
 M test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb
---diff---
diff --git a/app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb b/app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb
index 7f2878b..6cb516f 100644
--- a/app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb
+++ b/app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ class Rooms::InvolvementsController < ApplicationController
 
     broadcast_visibility_changes
     redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room)
+  rescue ArgumentError
+    redirect_to room_involvement_url(@room), alert: t(".invalid_involvement")
   end
 
   private
diff --git a/config/locales/en.yml b/config/locales/en.yml
index 60999e5..3fa61e7 100644
--- a/config/locales/en.yml
+++ b/config/locales/en.yml
@@ -30,3 +30,7 @@
 # available at https://guides.rubyonrails.org/i18n.html.
 
 en:
+  rooms:
+    involvements:
+      update:
+        invalid_involvement: "Invalid notification setting"
diff --git a/test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb b/test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb
index d535e97..3fc5319 100644
--- a/test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb
+++ b/test/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller_test.rb
@@ -44,6 +44,15 @@ class Rooms::InvolvementsControllerTest < ActionDispatch::IntegrationTest
     end
   end
 
+  test "updating involvement with an invalid value does not update the membership" do
+    assert_no_changes -> { memberships(:david_watercooler).reload.involvement } do
+      put room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler)), params: { involvement: "bogus" }
+      assert_redirected_to room_involvement_url(rooms(:watercooler))
+    end
+
+    assert_equal "Invalid notification setting", flash[:alert]
+  end
+
   test "a non-admin can update their room involvement" do
     sign_in :jz

content.text:
Change is complete and left uncommitted as requested.

**Summary:** `Rooms::InvolvementsController#update` (app/controllers/rooms/involvements_controller.rb:8-15) now rescues the `ArgumentError` that Rails' enum raises on an invalid `involvement` value, redirecting back to the room involvement page with a localized flash alert (new key in config/locales/en.yml) instead of crashing. Valid values still update the membership, broadcast visibility changes, and redirect as before. Added a regression test; full suite passes except one pre-existing, unrelated failure caused by a missing `libjxl` dylib for ffprobe in this environment.

Valid values still update the membership, broadcast visibility changes, and redirect as before. Added a regression test; full suite passes except one pre-existing, unrelated failure caused by a missing `libjxl` dylib for ffprobe in this environment.
